title: Trump says he could meet Iran's supreme leader 'if it was to make a deal'
summary_full: Khamenei was named the supreme leader in Iran after his father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was killed on the first day of fighting.
summary_public: Khamenei was named the supreme leader in Iran after his father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was killed on the first day of fighting.
